Catalog/Urology/Provure+ Ureteral Access Sheath Y-Type
UrologyREF: MRL-URO-008

Provure+ Ureteral Access Sheath Y-Type

Provure+ · Sheaths

Facilitates continuous irrigation and efficient fluid management. Enables simultaneous scope access and suction. Y connector available for negative suction. Improves visibility by clearing stone fragments and debris.

MaterialMedical Grade Polymer
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Facilitates continuous irrigation and efficient fluid management. Enables simultaneous scope access and suction. Y connector available for negative suction. Improves visibility by clearing stone fragments and debris.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Provure+ Ureteral Access Sheath Y-Type, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Provure+ Ureteral Access Sheath Y-Type is constructed using Medical Grade Polymer, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
